synergies.teammate_name: W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff

core_idea: The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist — Iron Maiden → The Self Unbound — Flow State identity. The gameplan is building Corpus Ingredient Count through skill hits and the combat passive, then spending stacks to power up S2 (at 10+ Count) and cash out with S3 (consumes up to 20 for escalating damage). Scaling conditions: Clash Power +1 per negative effect type (max +2); Final Power +1 per 4 Bleed (max +3).
playstyle_guide:
- Front-load **+4 Aggro** on the slot you want enemies to target.
- Pair high-Aggro turns with Guard or Assist Defense so passives trigger under pressure.
- **Haste** triggers on **Evade** — Evade when you want the Speed spike next turn.
- Build Corpus Ingredient Count with S2 — spend via S2, S3 once you hit 10+ (consumes up to 20).
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: Clash Power +1 per negative effect type (max +2).
- The kit transitions to The Self Unbound — Flow State once (reaching Artwork: Fascia tier 2 via the combat passive). Before the transition, play normally; after, you gain access to a stronger skill set.
- Hold S3 for when At 10+ Corpus Ingredient Count is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Butcher - Ribs** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Iron Maiden exclusive Skill ; [On Use] Clash Power +1 for every type of negative effect on target (max 2) ; [On Use] Final Power +1 for every 4 Bleed on target (max 3)
- Clash Power +1 per negative effect type (max +2)
- Final Power +1 per 4 Bleed (max +3)

**S2 — Fascia Hungers** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Peak output requires both conditions: Iron Maiden exclusive Skill | [On Use] Clash Power +1 for every type of negative effect on target (max 2).
- Clash Power +1 per negative effect type (max +2)
- Final Power +1 per 4 Bleed (max +4)
- converts coins to Unbreakable under condition
- Gain +4 Corpus Ingredient Count

**S3 — Repressed Flesh** (BP 4, CP +3, x4): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Peak output requires both conditions: Iron Maiden exclusive Skill | [On Use] Final Power +1 for every 4 Bleed on target (max 3).
- Final Power +1 per 4 Bleed (max +3)
- +5% per negative effect type (max +30%)
- +3% per Corpus Ingredient Count consumed
- Each debuff type on the target adds +5% damage (up to +30%) — stack statuses broadly.

Combat passive — **Fascia, My Precious Artwork**: Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain +(# of -faction allies on the field x 2) Corpus Ingredient Count (max 10).
  - Skill End: If the Skill dealt HP or Shield damage, gain +5 Corpus Ingredient Count.
  - If target is killed, gain +3 additional Corpus Ingredient Count.

Combat passive — **Armor of Protection and Repression**: Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain Iron Maiden.
  - Turn End: If this unit has Artwork: Fascia, this unit loses Iron Maiden and gains The Self Unbound — Flow State (once per Encounter).
  - When Staggered, recover from Stagger (excluding forced Staggers).

The transition to The Self Unbound — Flow State triggers automatically (reaching Artwork: Fascia tier 2 via the combat passive, once per Encounter). Unlocks Evade/Counter defensive skills and an upgraded attack skill set.
team_suggestions: **Bleed** focus. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.
- **The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu**: 'Please, Do Stop Running and Be Seated' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **The Ring Fauvist Docent Rodion**: 'Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: 'It flows and cries' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
